title: CI: e2e: fix checkpoint flake
body:
Two flakes seen in the last three months. One of them was in
August, so it's not related to ongoing criu-4.0 problems.

Suspected cause: race waiting for "podman run --rm" container
to transition from stopped to removed.

Solution: allow a 5-second grace period, retrying every second.

Also: add explanations to the Expect()s, remove unnecessary
code, and tighten up the CID check.


* fedora-39 : int podman fedora-39 root container boltdb
  * PR #23706
    * [08-22-2024 07:26](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4615576243404800/html/int-podman-fedora-39-root-container-boltdb.log.html#t--Podman-checkpoint-podman-checkpoint-and-restore-container-with-root-file-system-changes-using-ignore-rootfs-during-restore--1)
* fedora-40 : int remote fedora-40 root host boltdb [remote]
  * PR #24238
    * [10-16 12:45](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6099033729531904/html/int-remote-fedora-40-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--Podman-checkpoint-podman-checkpoint-and-restore-container-with-root-file-system-changes-using-ignore-rootfs-during-restore--1)

| x | x | x | x | x | x |
| ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| int(2) | remote(1) | fedora-40(1) | root(2) | host(1) | boltdb(2) |
|  | podman(1) | fedora-39(1) |  | container(1) |  |


Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: Cockpit tests failed for commit 81b2f2f69e975c89ac8b7164db9ee92cb0c922e4. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.

The cockpit F41 failure is the same as the one discussed in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/24238#issuecomment-2417049948 ff. Reported to https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2319310 and workaround in https://github.com/cockpit-project/cockpit-podman/pull/1883 .

You can retry or ignore here.
